title.en: SACCHARIDES OBTAINED FROM NATURAL SOURCES OR BY HYDROLYSIS OF NATURALLY OCCURRING DISACCHARIDES, OLIGOSACCHARIDES OR POLYSACCHARIDES (chemically synthesised sugars or sugar derivatives C07H; polysaccharides, e.g. starch, derivatives thereof C08B; malt C12C; fermentation or enzyme-using processes for preparing compounds containing saccharide radicals C12P19/00; production of sucrose C13B)
Glucose (separation from invert sugar C13K3/00); Glucose-containing syrups
obtained by saccharification of cellulosic materials (manufacture of fodder A23K10/32)
obtained by saccharification of starch or raw materials containing starch
Invert sugar; Separation of glucose or fructose from invert sugar
Sugars not otherwise provided for in this class
{Separation of sugars provided for in subclass C13K (C13K3/00 takes precedence)}
